summary: Iteration 235 — Pacchetti Documentali D1+D2+D3 Testing Complete. Backend: 38/38 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified including document upload, package creation from templates, D3 verification engine with status calculation.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: session token BccyJvnOyrPXRRYy4GfxR5osuF51RWcYWWnUUoHx434, user_id user_6988e9b9316c. Existing DURC document doc_1f3432425c4c and package pack_f6581a6a70e5.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pacchetti Documentali D1+D2+D3 fully working. Key features verified: (1) GET /api/documenti/tipi returns 26 document types with correct entity_type, has_expiry, privacy_level. (2) POST /api/documenti uploads document with form-data and calculates status (valido/in_scadenza/scaduto). (3) GET /api/documenti lists documents with filters. (4) PATCH /api/documenti/{id} updates metadata. (5) GET /api/pacchetti-documentali/templates returns 5 templates (INGRESSO_CANTIERE 11 rules, QUALIFICA_FORNITORE 8 rules, PERSONALE_OPERATIVO 7 rules, DOCUMENTI_MEZZI 4 rules, PACCHETTO_SICUREZZA 7 rules). (6) POST /api/pacchetti-documentali creates package from template with expanded items. (7) POST /api/pacchetti-documentali/{id}/verifica runs D3 verification engine - matches items against archive, calculates status (attached/missing/expired/in_scadenza), sets blocking flag, calculates summary counters, determines pack status (pronto_invio/incompleto/draft). (8) Frontend /pacchetti-documentali page has 2 tabs (Archivio, Pacchetti). (9) Archivio tab shows upload form, search, filters, document list with status badges. (10) Pacchetti tab shows new package form with template selector, package checklist with 3-column status display.
